title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how they are adopting AI coding tools at scale, including workflow changes, productivity measurement, and strategic advice. Key observations include process re-platforming, shifting time allocation away from coding toward other tasks, and accelerated delivery timelines with smaller teams.
